task:
The RenderDoc UI configuration file at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config is a plain JSON document (despite the `.config` extension). Make exactly these two changes, leaving every other key unchanged:

1. Set `"UIStyle"` to the exact string `"Dark"` (case-sensitive).
2. Set `"Font_GlobalScale"` to the JSON number `1.25` (not the string `"1.25"`).

The top-level key `"rdocConfigData"` must remain present with the value `1` — do not delete it.
